svg.title: Phase 2 ML pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full modeling pipeline from raw OTPW data through feature engineering, three preprocessing streams, VectorAssembler, train-test split, classifiers, and evaluation.

g.text: Train Q1-Q3: 4.3M rows | Test Q4: 1.4M rows | weight 4.21:1
LR (baseline) | LR+L1 | LR+L2 | Random Forest (100 trees)
Class-1 F1, AUC-ROC, AUC-PR, precision, recall
